_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: The NF1 lines, particularly the NF90-8 cells, also show prolonged EGFR phosphorylation subsequent to EGF treatment
details: Shows sustained ERK activation and particularly prolonged EGFR phosphorylation subsequent to EGF treatment
